case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. VS. THERON L JONES I et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT JONES I, THERON L DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-29-2012

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL, DUE DILIGENCE ATTACHED, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. SERVED MAR-23-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JONES I, THERON L
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT JONES I, THERON L
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $277.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT JONES I, THERON L
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION WAIVING ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ORDER ADMITTING COPIES INTO EVIDENCE IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES I, THERON L $4,883.18 PRINCIPAL, $277.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,160.18, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: KENNARD, ROBERT S SUBSTITUTED FOR BLEIER, ELIZABETH A AS ATTORNEY FOR FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.
